news.title: Iranian projectiles continue to strike Gulf countries; Tehran says new leader appointed
news.summary: Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates report more strikes on civilian targets as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran continue. Bahrain and the U.A.E. say more strikes are being carried out against Iranian targets.

news.title: China says 'thorough preparations' needed as Trump-Xi meeting hangs in the balance amid Iran war
news.summary: China's top diplomat Wang Yi signaled preparations are underway for a planned meeting between the presidents of the U.S. and China. Wang Yi said preparations were made for a meeting between President Obama and President Xi Jinping.

news.title: Global week ahead: Diplomacy in ruins as G7 meets on Iran
news.summary: G7 finance ministers and central bank governors are set to convene for a key meeting. The meeting comes as diplomatic tensions escalate over the Iran conflict.

news.title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks despite ongoing volatility
news.summary: TipRanks compiles some of the best stocks to own amid the current volatility, according to the Street's top analysts. Check out the list below.

news.title: Iran war could make affordability bigger issue in 2026 elections
news.summary: The 2026 midterm election will determine whether Democrats can win back majorities in both chambers of Congress, and check President Donald Trump's policies. The election will be held on November 4, 2026.

news.title: ‘I don’t own a home’: I’m 62, unemployed and have $1.5 million for retirement. Can I afford to divorce my husband?
news.summary: “He has no loyalty to me or our vows,” she says. “He’s not loyal to his wife or his family.”

news.title: ‘When he doesn’t get money, he becomes angry’: My brother has led a life of chaos and financial ruin. What is my moral obligation?
news.summary: “Without clear distance and boundaries, he will pull me down with him,” she says. “Withoutclear distance and boundary, he’s going to pull you down too.”

news.title: ‘My mother refuses to turn on the heat’: Will America’s war with Iran really push up our utility bills?
news.summary: "She is reading alarmist headlines about Iran in the newspapers," says a source close to the Iranian government. "She is worried about what she sees in the news," the source adds.

news.title: ‘He has been emotionally abusive’: My father, 75, is on oxygen and destitute. What do I owe him?
news.summary: “He has less than $20,000 to his name and no income besides Social Security,” his attorney says. “He’s got nothing.” “I’m not going to let him get away with anything,’ he adds.

news.title: We have $13.5 million and 3 kids, but one is an addict. How do we fairly divide our estate?
news.summary: “We are the first generation on either side of our families to experience this level of success,” he says. “We’re the first family to have achieved this.”
